title: SPRINGFIELD EUGENE TENANT ASSOCIATION - 211info
text: SPRINGFIELD EUGENE TENANT ASSOCIATION SPRINGFIELD EUGENE TENANT ASSOCIATION Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a hotline/message phone to tenants experiencing issues with housing or landlord disputes who need information about renters' rights. Also offers online resources about evictions and terminations, discrimination and retaliation, habitability and repairs, and guides about leases, deposits, and fees. Eligibility: Individuals experiencing tenancy issues with rental properties Hours: 24 hours per day / 7 days per week Email (541) 972-3715 Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Message Phone (541) 972-3715 Tenant Hotline Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call or visit website for more information. If calling, please leave a brief description of issue being experienced. This is a voice mail line and it may take several days to a week for calls to be returned. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None required at intake LANGUAGES: English, interpretation or signing by arrangement AREA SERVED: Lane County Services: Tenant Rights Information/Counseling If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. No Mapping Information Available
